series_metadata.series_description: Files of meetings of the Public Health Council, including, but not limited to, agendas, meeting minutes, correspondence, other meeting related records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
